triage_rows.direction: keep_the_outer controller on lightweight single-row runtime-stack packet polling when the packet-change signal remains stable
treat_contract_action_change_as_a_legitimate top-level packet update because it changes the current supervising instruction

interpretation: This is the topmost change detector for the single-row runtime-stack control packet.
An outer controller can stay on this layer most of the time and only reopen the runtime-stack control packet when it changes.
